name: Harvey Norman Holdings Limited
analysis: HVN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.7400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.8200, stop A$4.2372, target A$6.2603 (2.47:1) — then trail it.
